bead.title: Add gate-based query filter and lifecycle gate enforcement (FEAT-019)
bead.description: Prerequisite: axon-88b4b5f1 (gate_results on Entity) must be complete. (1) Query filter: extend query_entities in axon-api/src/handler.rs to support filter path '_gates.{gate_name}' (eq: true/false) and synthetic path '_gates.complete' (true = all gate_results entries have pass=true). Gate values come from the persisted gate_results field — no re-evaluation at query time. (2) Lifecycle gate enforcement (requires_gate) is OUT OF SCOPE for this task — it depends on FEAT-010 (state machines, 0% implemented). Do not implement requires_gate checking here.
bead.acceptance: query_entities with filter _gates.complete=true returns only entities where all gate_results entries have pass=true; filter _gates.complete=true on an entity with NO gate_results (empty map) returns true — trivially all gates pass; filter _gates.{name}=false returns entities where that specific gate failed; filter _gates.{name}=true returns entities where that gate passed; combining gate filter with other field filters works correctly; lifecycle transition acceptance criteria are NOT part of this bead
